headline: Why Mastercard and Visa Are the Definition of Forever Stocks
summary: Despite a weak year for financials, Visa and Mastercard remain forever stocks due to their global duopoly, massive profit margins, and forecast industry growth.

raw.headline: Why Mastercard and Visa Are the Definition of Forever Stocks

headline: MasterCard price target raised to $735 from $730 at Tigress Financial
summary: Tigress Financial raised the firm’s price target on MasterCard (MA) to $735 from $730 and keeps a Strong Buy rating on the shares. The firm views MasterCard as one of the best ways to play the global shift from cash to electronic payments. The recent pullback in shares has created a “major buying opportunity,” the analyst tells investors in a research note.Claim 70% Off TipRanks PremiumUnlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions Stay ahead of the mark
